item.title: Who Raided the Safe Room?
item.description: A safe room is unexpectedly accessed during a repo operation. A look at the event, how it unfolded, and the steps taken afterward.

media:content.media:title: Who Raided the Safe Room?
media:content.media:description: A safe room is unexpectedly accessed during a repo operation. A look at the event, how it unfolded, and the steps taken afterward.

item.title: From $18K to $21K—Deal Done
item.description: A straightforward negotiation sees the price move from $18K to $21K. Here’s how the deal came together and what made the difference.

media:content.media:title: From $18K to $21K—Deal Done
media:content.media:description: A straightforward negotiation sees the price move from $18K to $21K. Here’s how the deal came together and what made the difference.

item.title: New GTX Ready to Drive
item.description: Check out the new GTX and its manual power. A first look at the car’s performance, handling, and what makes it a thrilling drive.

media:content.media:title: New GTX Ready to Drive
media:content.media:description: Check out the new GTX and its manual power. A first look at the car’s performance, handling, and what makes it a thrilling drive.

item.title: Can a Turtle Beat a Nitro Car?
item.description: A surprising race pits a turtle against a nitro-powered car. Watch the unexpected showdown and see how timing, speed, and fun collide on the track.

media:content.media:title: Can a Turtle Beat a Nitro Car?
media:content.media:description: A surprising race pits a turtle against a nitro-powered car. Watch the unexpected showdown and see how timing, speed, and fun collide on the track.

item.title: Who Forgot to Refuel the Plane?
item.description: A routine pre-flight check uncovers a missed refueling. A look at how the crew handled the oversight and ensured safety before takeoff.

media:content.media:title: Who Forgot to Refuel the Plane?
media:content.media:description: A routine pre-flight check uncovers a missed refueling. A look at how the crew handled the oversight and ensured safety before takeoff.

item.title: Cheap Race Car, Big Decisions?
item.description: A budget-friendly race car purchase sparks tough choices. Watch as we weigh the costs, risks, and potential rewards before committing to the build and hitting the track.

media:content.media:title: Cheap Race Car, Big Decisions?
media:content.media:description: A budget-friendly race car purchase sparks tough choices. Watch as we weigh the costs, risks, and potential rewards before committing to the build and hitting the track.

item.title: School Project Turns Into A Cadillac Rescue
item.description: A routine school project took an unexpected turn when we ended up restoring a Cadillac. See how learning, teamwork, and creativity brought this classic car back to life.

media:content.media:title: School Project Turns Into A Cadillac Rescue
media:content.media:description: A routine school project took an unexpected turn when we ended up restoring a Cadillac. See how learning, teamwork, and creativity brought this classic car back to life.

item.title: 10 Days of Work in 3!
item.description: Facing a tight deadline, we compressed nearly 10 days of restoration work into just three. Here’s how careful planning, teamwork, and focus helped us stay on track and meet the goal.

media:content.media:title: 10 Days of Work in 3!
media:content.media:description: Facing a tight deadline, we compressed nearly 10 days of restoration work into just three. Here’s how careful planning, teamwork, and focus helped us stay on track and meet the goal.

item.title: How Did Bob Total a Car?!
item.description: After an unexpected accident left the car declared a total loss, Bob reflects on what happened and the lessons learned. A candid look at responsibility, recovery, and moving forward.

media:content.media:title: How Did Bob Total a Car?!
media:content.media:description: After an unexpected accident left the car declared a total loss, Bob reflects on what happened and the lessons learned. A candid look at responsibility, recovery, and moving forward.

item.title: Supplier Just Ruined Our 6-Speed Plan �� #AutoDrama #TruckMods #BuildChallengeSupplier Just Ruined Our 6-Speed Plan
item.description: A key supplier issue has forced us to rethink our 6-speed truck build. Here’s what happened, how it affects the project timeline, and the next steps for getting the plan back on track.

media:content.media:title: Supplier Just Ruined Our 6-Speed Plan �� #AutoDrama #TruckMods #BuildChallengeSupplier Just Ruined Our 6-Speed Plan
media:content.media:description: A key supplier issue has forced us to rethink our 6-speed truck build. Here’s what happened, how it affects the project timeline, and the next steps for getting the plan back on track.

item.title: Ted Wanted 42.5K… He Got 40K
item.description: A straightforward car deal negotiation where the asking price was 42.5K, and the final agreement landed at 40K. Here’s how the conversation unfolded and what made the differen

media:content.media:title: Ted Wanted 42.5K… He Got 40K
media:content.media:description: A straightforward car deal negotiation where the asking price was 42.5K, and the final agreement landed at 40K. Here’s how the conversation unfolded and what made the differen

item.title: Finally Driving My Dream 350Z!
item.description: After years of waiting, I finally get behind the wheel of my dream 350Z. Join me for the first drive and see what makes this iconic sports car such a personal milestone.

media:content.media:title: Finally Driving My Dream 350Z!
media:content.media:description: After years of waiting, I finally get behind the wheel of my dream 350Z. Join me for the first drive and see what makes this iconic sports car such a personal milestone.
